title: Build an Event Flyer Page
description: A Pet Rock Festival event flyer demonstrating absolute and relative CSS units. The body uses vw for width and calc() to set min-height based on the viewport. Sections are displayed inline-block with percent widths, hr elements use percent width, and padding uses px. The layout is a fluid, centered single-page flyer with a header, three content sections, and a footer.
objectives: Use vw to set an element's width relative to the viewport
Use calc() to compute min-height as 100vh minus padding
Set width using percentage values relative to the parent
Use display: inline-block to place sections side by side
Use the time element with a datetime attribute for semantic dates
